title: Classic Margherita Pizza
description: A timeless Neapolitan-style pizza with fresh mozzarella, basil, and San Marzano tomatoes on a crisp, chewy crust.
author: Maria Rossi
instructions: Dissolve yeast in warm water and let sit for 5 minutes until foamy.
Mix flour and salt, then add yeast mixture. Knead for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Cover and let rise for 2 hours until doubled in size.
Preheat oven to its highest setting with a pizza stone or steel inside.
Stretch dough into four 10-inch rounds. Top each with crushed tomatoes, torn mozzarella, and a drizzle of olive oil.
Bake for 10–12 minutes until the crust is charred and cheese is bubbling.
Finish with fresh basil and a pinch of sea salt before serving.

title: Fluffy Buttermilk Pancakes
description: Stack-high pancakes with golden edges and a tender, cloud-like interior — perfect for lazy weekend mornings.
author: James Chen
ingredients: Maple syrup and butter for serving
instructions: Whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
In another bowl, whisk buttermilk, eggs, and melted butter until combined.
Pour wet ingredients into dry and stir until just combined — a few lumps are fine.
Heat a griddle or skillet over medium heat and lightly butter.
Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake. Cook until bubbles form on top, then flip.
Cook another 1–2 minutes until golden. Serve warm with maple syrup.

title: Dark Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Individual molten chocolate cakes with a gooey center — an impressive dessert that comes together in under 30 minutes.
author: Sophie Laurent
instructions: Preheat oven to 220°C (425°F). Butter two ramekins and dust with cocoa powder.
Melt chocolate and butter together in a double boiler, then let cool slightly.
Whisk eggs, yolks, and sugar until pale and thick. Fold in chocolate mixture, then flour and salt.
Divide batter between ramekins. Bake for exactly 12 minutes — centers should still jiggle.
Rest for 1 minute, then invert onto plates. Serve immediately with vanilla ice cream.

title: Thai Green Curry
description: A fragrant, creamy curry loaded with vegetables and tender chicken in a homemade green paste.
author: Niran Patel
ingredients: Thai basil and jasmine rice to serve
instructions: Fry curry paste in a wok over medium-high heat for 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add thick coconut cream from the top of the can and stir until oil separates.
Add chicken and cook until no longer pink on the outside.
Pour in remaining coconut milk, fish sauce, and palm sugar. Simmer for 10 minutes.
Add bell pepper and bamboo shoots. Cook 5 more minutes until vegetables are tender.
Stir in Thai basil. Serve over jasmine rice with lime wedges.

title: Fresh Mango Smoothie
description: A tropical, velvety smoothie with ripe mango, yogurt, and a hint of lime — refreshing any time of day.
author: Elena Vasquez
instructions: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend on high until completely smooth, about 60 seconds.
Taste and adjust sweetness with more honey if needed.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

title: Mediterranean Quinoa Bowl
description: A vibrant, protein-packed bowl with fluffy quinoa, roasted vegetables, feta, and a lemon-herb dressing.
author: Alex Thompson
instructions: Cook quinoa according to package directions and let cool slightly.
Toss zucchini, tomatoes, and onion with olive oil. Roast at 200°C for 20 minutes.
Whisk lemon juice, remaining olive oil, parsley, and oregano for the dressing.
Divide quinoa between bowls. Top with roasted vegetables, feta, and olives.
Drizzle with dressing and serve warm or at room temperature.
